рҹ“… Created: Jan 2026 вҖў Updated: May 2026

вңЁ рқ—һрқ—ҳрқ—¬ рқ—ҷрқ—ҳрқ—”рқ—§рқ—Ёрқ—Ҙрқ—ҳрқ—Ұ вңЁ

вң… AI-powered mobile device automation
вң… Control Android and iOS devices, emulators, and simulators
вң… Unified DSL-first interface
вң… Batch execution of device interactions via `execute_dsl`
вң… Server-side handling of retry/failure strategies
вң… Device management tools (list, get, start/stop bridge)
вң… Screenshot capabilities (low-quality for LLM, high-quality for reporting)
вң… App management (list, install, uninstall, debug)
вң… Test management for `.mob` files


вқҖвқҖвқҖвқҖвқҖвқҖвқҖвқҖвқҖвқҖвқҖвқҖвқҖвқҖвқҖвқҖвқҖвқҖвқҖвқҖвқҖвқҖвқҖвқҖ

рҹ”Қ 0 рқ—јрқ—Ҫрқ—Ірқ—» рқ—¶рқҳҖрқҳҖрқҳӮрқ—ІрқҳҖ

рҹ“қ рқ—”рқ—•рқ—ўрқ—Ёрқ—§ рқ—§рқ—ӣрқ—ңрқ—Ұ рқ—Јрқ—Ҙрқ—ўрқ—қрқ—ҳрқ—–рқ—§

The MobAI MCP Server enables AI assistants to control Android and iOS devices, emulators, and simulators through a unified DSL-first interface. It simplifies device interaction by batching commands via a single `execute_dsl` tool, which handles complex sequences of actions, predicates, assertions, and waits server-side.

вқҖвқҖвқҖвқҖвқҖвқҖвқҖвқҖвқҖвқҖвқҖвқҖвқҖвқҖвқҖвқҖвқҖвқҖвқҖвқҖвқҖвқҖвқҖвқҖ

рҹ”— рқ—ҹрқ—ңрқ—Ўрқ—һрқ—Ұ
вҖў рқ—ҡрқ—¶рқҳҒрқ—ӣрқҳӮрқ—Ҝ: https://github.com/MobAI-App/mobai-mcp

Glance is a self-hosted, highly customizable dashboard designed to aggregate various feeds and information sources into a single, streamlined interface. It offers a fast, lightweight experience with low memory usage and a single binary for easy deployment, making it ideal for personal dashboards and monitoring.

рҹ“қ рқ—”рқ—•рқ—ўрқ—Ёрқ—§ рқ—§рқ—ӣрқ—ңрқ—Ұ рқ—Јрқ—Ҙрқ—ўрқ—қрқ—ҳрқ—–рқ—§

Crucix is a personal intelligence agent that aggregates data from 27 open-source intelligence feeds, including satellite imagery, flight tracking, and economic indicators. It presents this information on a self-contained dashboard and can be integrated with LLMs to provide real-time alerts and respond to commands, acting as a personal analyst without cloud reliance.

Deep Agents is a Python agent harness built on LangGraph, designed for complex, long-horizon tasks. It provides an opinionated framework with features like sub-agents, filesystem access, and persistent memory, making it production-ready for various LLM applications.

рҹ“қ рқ—”рқ—•рқ—ўрқ—Ёрқ—§ рқ—§рқ—ӣрқ—ңрқ—Ұ рқ—Јрқ—Ҙрқ—ўрқ—қрқ—ҳрқ—–рқ—§

Project N.O.M.A.D. is a self-contained, offline-first knowledge and education server that provides access to a curated collection of tools and resources. It leverages Docker to manage containerized applications, offering capabilities like AI chat with local knowledge bases, offline educational content, mapping, data tools, and system benchmarking, all accessible through a web-based Command Center.
